name: Hydrocortisone
executiveSummary: Corticosteroid with mineralocorticoid activity; for refractory septic shock and adrenal insufficiency.
indications:
## Indications

- Acute adrenal insufficiency.
- Refractory septic shock (stress-dose regimens).
- Graft-versus-host disease prophylaxis.

## Precautions

- Hyperglycemia, sodium retention.

> Adjust according to institutional protocols and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: Adrenal insufficiency: 100 mg IV bolus. Shock: 50 mg every 6 h or infusion according to protocol.

pediatrico.presentation: 100 or 500 mg powder for injection vial.
pediatrico.dose: Anti-inflammatory: 1 to 5 mg/kg/day. Asthma: loading dose of 4 to 8 mg/kg. Maintenance: 2 mg/kg/dose in 4 daily doses.
pediatrico.notes: Systemic corticosteroid. May cause hypertension, euphoria, abdominal distension, headache, seizures, weight gain, increased appetite.

stability:
## General

- Use after reconstitution according to package insert.

## Pediatric chart

- 24 h refrigerated.
